author: Valentin RAKOVSKY, Sophie RAMIS, Cléa PECULIER
title: Ukraine: position of military forces | | news-journal.com
text: Ukraine: position of military forces - Valentin RAKOVSKY, Sophie RAMIS, Cléa PECULIER - Updated Tags As featured on Ukraine on Thursday accused Russia of having deployed a ballistic missile designed to carry nuclear warheads for the first time in history which, if confirmed, would be a major escalation of the war. Russian President Vladimir Putin said Thursday that the conflict in Ukraine had characteristics of a "global" war and did not rule out strikes on Western countries.
